projects.paper_title: Combined hybridization capture and shotgun sequencing for ancient DNA analysis of extinct wild and domestic dromedary camel
projects.nordic_relevance_reason: The current curated project inventory does not yet identify a shipped Nordic-localized lead for this record.
projects.interpretation_caveat: Dromedary mitogenome range named on the primary paper page. It supports Camelus dromedarius only, not other camelids. This project stays in the evidence base for comparative context, not as shipped Nordic evidence.
projects.notes: Dromedary mitogenome range named on the primary paper page. It supports Camelus dromedarius only, not other camelids.

projects.paper_title: Combined hybridization capture and shotgun sequencing for ancient DNA analysis of extinct wild and domestic dromedary camel
projects.nordic_relevance_reason: The current curated project inventory does not yet identify a shipped Nordic-localized lead for this record.
projects.interpretation_caveat: Domestic-dromedary anchor. Comparator camelid evidence does not extend support to other camelid species automatically. This project stays in the evidence base for comparative context, not as shipped Nordic evidence.
projects.notes: Domestic-dromedary anchor. Comparator camelid evidence does not extend support to other camelid species automatically.
